items.title: Update vue-router to 5.1.0 in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the vue-router dependency from version 5.0.7 to 5.1.0, introducing several new features and bug fixes. Key improvements include typed parameters for definePage, support for raw param parsers, and enhanced error handling for query parameters. This update aims to enhance the overall routing experience in the Nexior application.

items.title: Update query-string to version 9.4.0 in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the query-string library from version 9.3.1 to 9.4.0, enhancing performance. The changes include modifications in both package-lock.json and package.json to reflect the new version. This upgrade ensures better efficiency in handling query strings within the application.

items.title: Update Stripe.js to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @stripe/stripe-js library from version 4.10.0 to 9.8.0, introducing several new features and improvements. Key changes include the addition of CurrencySelector element definitions and new appearance API variable types, enhancing the payment experience. This upgrade ensures better compatibility and access to the latest features provided by Stripe.

items.title: Update Capacitor Core to Latest Version in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @capacitor/core dependency from version 8.3.4 to 8.4.0. Key improvements include bug fixes for Android system bars and enhancements to the CLI, such as capturing telemetry data and adding new experimental options. This upgrade ensures better stability and performance for the Nexior project.

items.title: Update TypeScript ESLint Parser to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @typescript-eslint/parser from version 8.60.1 to 8.61.0, aligning it with other projects. Key improvements include tighter type specifications for various AST nodes and a fix for ECMAScript line terminators. This change enhances type-checking capabilities and overall code quality.

items.title: Update Vue to Latest Version in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps Vue from version 3.5.33 to 3.5.35, incorporating several bug fixes and performance improvements. Key enhancements include optimizations in the runtime and reactivity systems, which should lead to a smoother user experience. The changes are expected to enhance the overall stability and efficiency of the application.

items.title: Update Node Types to 25.9.2 in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @types/node package from version 25.9.1 to 25.9.2. The changes include modifications in both package-lock.json and package.json files, ensuring compatibility with the latest type definitions. This enhancement helps maintain the stability and performance of the project.
